'''âd-s-k-g''' ('''kadaskegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jones|jones]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-k-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jones|jones]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-s-k-g
|-
! Lemma
| kadaskegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidaskegoko|thidaskegoko]] || [[word:jidaskegoko|jidaskegoko]] || [[word:shidaskegoko|shidaskegoko]] || [[word:kidaskegoko|kidaskegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudaskegoko|thuthudaskegoko]] || [[word:jujudaskegoko|jujudaskegoko]] || [[word:shushudaskegoko|shushudaskegoko]] || [[word:kukudaskegoko|kukudaskegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodaskegoko|thodaskegoko]] || [[word:jodaskegoko|jodaskegoko]] || [[word:shodaskegoko|shodaskegoko]] || [[word:kodaskegoko|kodaskegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdaskegoko|thĂŠdaskegoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdaskegoko|jĂŠdaskegoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdaskegoko|shĂŠdaskegoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdaskegoko|kĂŠdaskegoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadaskegoko|thadaskegoko]] || [[word:jadaskegoko|jadaskegoko]] || [[word:shadaskegoko|shadaskegoko]] || [[word:kadaskegoko|kadaskegoko]]
|}
